title: CoverageAdded
description: Event published when a coverage is added to a policy.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

policyId.description: Unique identifier of the policy to which the coverage was added.

coverageId.description: Unique identifier of the newly added coverage.

coverageType.description: Type of coverage added (maps to CoverageType domain enum).

insuredAmount.description: Insured amount in CHF as a plain decimal string (e.g. '50000.00').

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the event was created.
